tier: Tier 7.5c - Curriculum / Environment Generator Scoring Gate
claim: Tier 7.5c scores the locked Tier 7.5b generated task families and confirms a generated-family software signal for current CRA v2.4 against fair external baselines, v2.2 reference, and shams/ablations on hidden generated splits.
caveat: Synthetic generated-family scoring only; not public real-world usefulness proof, not a mechanism promotion by itself, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence. Because the generator grammar is aligned with keyed/compositional features, Tier 7.5d attribution/promotion is required before any stronger claim.
